title: Register a new account with valid details
description: Verifies a user can submit the registration form with valid inputs and is taken into the authenticated app experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User Name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the user lands on the app workspace

title: Registration with mismatched passwords is blocked
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission when password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User Name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill a different valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Registration requires name, email, password, and confirmation
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents registration when mandatory fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User Name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Submit the registration form
Verify required field validation errors are visible
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Registration rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies the email field enforces a valid email format before allowing registration submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User Name into the name field
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Registration rejects too-short password
description: Verifies password policy validation prevents using a password that is too short.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User Name into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a too-short password into the password field
Fill the same too-short password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: AI Chat streams a response after sending a message
description: Verifies that a user can send a chat message from the app and receives a streamed AI response in the chat panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Type a message in chat input: Explain what React hooks are
Press Enter key
Verify an AI response message is displayed in the chat conversation

title: AI Chat can stop a streaming response
description: Verifies that the Stop control cancels an in-progress streamed response and leaves partial content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Type a message in chat input: Give me a detailed step by step roadmap for learning TypeScript from scratch
Press Enter key
Wait for the AI response to begin streaming
Click the Stop button to cancel streaming
Verify the AI response stops updating and a partial response remains visible

title: AI Chat clear chat removes previous conversation
description: Verifies that clearing chat removes existing messages from the chat panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Type a message in chat input: Summarize the difference between var let and const
Press Enter key
Wait for the AI response message to appear
Click the clear chat button
Verify the chat conversation shows an empty state with no prior messages displayed

title: AI Chat supports multi-line message entry and send
description: Verifies that the user can compose a multi-line message and send it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Type a message in chat input: Explain closures in JavaScript
Press Shift+Enter key
Type a message in chat input: Include one short code example
Press Enter key
Verify an AI response message is displayed for the multi-line prompt

title: AI Chat prevents sending an empty message
description: Verifies that sending an empty chat message does not add a new user message to the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Click into the chat input
Press Enter key
Verify no new user message is added to the chat conversation

title: AI Chat copy button copies code block content
description: Verifies that when an AI response includes a code block, the user can copy it using the copy control.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /app
Type a message in chat input: Provide a JavaScript example of a debounce function in a code block
Press Enter key
Wait for an AI response that includes a code block
Click the copy button on the code block
Verify a copy success confirmation is visible

title: Quiz: Take a quiz from a selected roadmap node and view results
description: Verifies a user can start a quiz from a roadmap node, answer questions, submit, and see a results summary with score and pass/fail.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the main app canvas to load
Select a roadmap node on the canvas
Click the take quiz action for the selected node
Answer multiple choice questions by selecting an option for each question
Submit the quiz
Verify a quiz results summary is displayed with a score percentage and a pass/fail outcome

title: Quiz: Timer is visible and counts down during an active quiz
description: Verifies that starting a quiz shows an active countdown timer during the quiz session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the main app canvas to load
Select a roadmap node on the canvas
Click the take quiz action for the selected node
Wait for the quiz interface to load
Verify a countdown timer is displayed for the active quiz

title: Quiz: Prevent submission when some questions are unanswered
description: Verifies the quiz cannot be submitted with incomplete answers and the user is prompted to complete required questions.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the main app canvas to load
Select a roadmap node on the canvas
Click the take quiz action for the selected node
Answer a multiple choice option for only the first question
Attempt to submit the quiz
Verify a validation message is displayed indicating unanswered questions must be completed before submitting

title: Quiz: Change an answer before submitting and results still render
description: Verifies a user can change a selected option for a question before submission and still receive results after submitting.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the main app canvas to load
Select a roadmap node on the canvas
Click the take quiz action for the selected node
Select a multiple choice option for the first question
Select a different multiple choice option for the first question
Answer the remaining questions by selecting an option for each question
Submit the quiz
Verify a quiz results summary is displayed

title: Quiz: Start quiz and exit without submitting returns to the app canvas
description: Verifies a user can leave the quiz interface and return to the main app without completing submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the main app canvas to load
Select a roadmap node on the canvas
Click the take quiz action for the selected node
Click the close or back control to exit the quiz
Verify the user is returned to the main app canvas view

title: Quiz: Timer expiration flow is not tested due to impractical wait time
description: This placeholder is intentionally omitted because waiting for a 5-minute timer expiration is not a reliable UI automation scenario.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands in the authenticated app experience

title: User Profile: View stats and edit name and bio successfully
description: Verifies profile stats load and a user can update name and bio and see the updated information after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Wait for the profile page to load
Fill in the name field with Test User Updated
Fill in the bio field with This is an updated bio for UI testing.
Save the profile changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the profile shows the updated name Test User Updated

title: User Profile: Invalid empty name shows validation error and does not update profile
description: Verifies saving an empty name is blocked with a validation error and the displayed profile name remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Wait for the profile page to load
Fill in the name field with Baseline Name
Save the profile changes
Fill in the name field with
Attempt to save the profile changes
Verify a name validation error is visible and the profile still displays the name Baseline Name

title: User Profile: Profile page loads primary content
description: Verifies the profile page shows key profile stats and a project list section.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Wait for the profile page to load
Verify profile stats are displayed (such as XP, level, streak, and projects)

title: Settings: Toggle theme and observe immediate UI update
description: Verifies a user can toggle between dark/light theme and the UI updates immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Wait for the settings page to load
Toggle the theme setting
Verify the overall application theme changes immediately

title: Settings: Theme preference persists after navigating away and back
description: Verifies the chosen theme remains applied after leaving settings and returning within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Wait for the settings page to load
Toggle the theme setting
Click the navigation to go to the profile page
Click the navigation to return to the settings page
Verify the theme remains in the toggled state after returning to settings

title: Settings: Delete account flow can be canceled from confirmation dialog
description: Verifies the delete account confirmation dialog can be opened and canceled without removing access to the app UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Wait for the settings page to load
Click the delete account action
Cancel the deletion in the confirmation dialog
Verify the user remains on the settings page with account still accessible

title: Settings: Delete account confirmation action shows a visible outcome
description: Verifies confirming deletion produces a visible result such as a success confirmation or an explanatory error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Wait for the settings page to load
Click the delete account action
Confirm the deletion in the confirmation dialog
Verify a visible outcome is shown indicating deletion completed or that deletion is not fully implemented

title: Persist language selection and update UI
description: Verifies a logged-in user can switch the app language and the selection persists after revisiting the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the language preferences page
Select Indonesian as the application language
Wait for the language change to apply
Click the navigation link to open the profile page
Click the navigation link to open the language preferences page
Verify the language selection shows Indonesian as the current preference
Verify the UI text on the language page is displayed in Indonesian

title: Switch language back to English
description: Verifies a logged-in user can switch from Indonesian to English and UI reflects the change immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the language preferences page
Select English as the application language
Wait for the language change to apply
Verify the language selection shows English as the current preference
Verify the UI text on the language page is displayed in English

title: Language selection is reflected across pages in the same session
description: Verifies that after changing language, other authenticated pages display UI text in the selected language.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the language preferences page
Select Indonesian as the application language
Click the navigation link to open the settings page
Verify the settings page content is displayed in Indonesian
Click the navigation link to open the profile page
Verify the profile page content is displayed in Indonesian

title: Open language page and view primary content
description: Verifies the language preferences page loads and shows language options to a logged-in user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the language preferences page
Verify language options are displayed
Verify a current language preference indicator is displayed

title: Selecting the already active language does not disrupt UI
description: Verifies choosing the currently active language leaves the UI stable and the selection remains consistent.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the language preferences page
Select English as the application language
Select English as the application language again
Verify the language selection shows English as the current preference
Verify the UI remains in English after the second selection
